scenario: PII(901010-1234567) → 보안 정책 경고 차단 검증
warning_text: ⚠️ 보안 경고  민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. (This request was blocked due to sensitive information.)
notes: First send via composer click+type+send-button click; visible UI did not advance (typical Lexical hydration quirk). Hard reload triggered engine intercept on kimi.com document fetch — tab title became '보안 정책 - 접근 차단' and full-page replacement rendered top-right warning bubble. Page-replacement format (engine wrapped HTTP 200 body). No '서버 예외' toast encountered; only 1 reload required.
